category_sources: Official Metview docs at https://metview.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ and ECMWF page describe a meteorological workstation for data access, processing, and visualisation
docs_sources: Official ECMWF Confluence page says Metview documentation is now on Read the Docs and describes the product
source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation site
repo_sources: Official ECMWF Bitbucket public repository search lists a public repository named metview
Repository page at git.ecmwf.int/users/dabh/repos/metview/browse is an ECMWF Bitbucket source-control view for Metview
tags_sources: Official ECMWF Metview page lists GRIB, BUFR, NetCDF, data access, processing, and visualisation capabilities
